    Kadhiye Panner Recipe

    Kadhiye Panner, also known as Kadai Paneer, is a popular North Indian dish made with paneer, bell peppers, and onions in a spiced tomato-based gravy. The dish is known for its bold, flavorful, and rustic taste, making it a favorite among Indian restaurants. Here's a simple recipe to make Kadhiye Panner at home:
    1. Ingredients: Paneer, bell peppers (capsicum), onions, tomatoes, freshly ground kadai masala, coriander seeds, Kashmiri dried red chilies, garam masala, salt, and water.
    2. Preparation:
    • Heat oil in a kadai and add onions. Sauté until translucent.
    • Add bell peppers and sauté until they are about 80% done.
    • Add tomatoes and cook until the oil separates.
    • Mix in kadai masala, coriander seeds, and Kashmiri dried red chilies.
    • Add paneer cubes and cook until they are tender.
    • Serve hot with roti or naan.
      6

      This dish is not only easy to prepare but also offers a delightful experience with its unique flavor profile. Enjoy your cooking!

    Make Kadai Masala
